section.description: I build modern applications with a focus on performance and experience.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.pomodoro: Productivity timer based on the Pomodoro technique with an intuitive interface.
projects.notes: A streamlined system for organizing notes and reminders with a functional UI.
projects.stranger: Themed landing page featuring advanced animations and immersive design.
projects.bmw: Automotive showcase interface focusing on aesthetics and visual interactivity.

p1.part1: I am a Full-Stack developer passionate about transforming complex ideas into
p1.part2: interfaces. My main focus is architecting applications where raw
p1.part3: go hand in hand, ensuring every interaction is fluid and every millisecond is optimized.

p2.part1: My development journey is guided by technical curiosity and a commitment to code quality. Currently, I focus my work on the
p2.part2: ecosystem, mastering cutting-edge tools to create immersive layouts that defy the ordinary.

p3.part2: . I firmly believe that the success of a digital product is born at the intersection of robust back-end logic, well-structured databases, and a front-end that breathes innovation. I am always looking for the next challenge that allows me to raise the bar of what is possible to build on the web.
